input.headline: With one touch, they vanish. Meet the delicate, icy wonders called frost flowers

raw.headline: With one touch, they vanish. Meet the delicate, icy wonders called frost flowers

winner: They said the ice sculpture was a real showstopper — until someone sneezed and it vanished in one touch. Turns out, it wasn't just frost flowers, it was a frost *snort*.

candidates.text: I tried to touch a frost flower once—now my fingers are permanently on vacation.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'vacation' add a surprising twist, is concise, specific, and ties well to the headline's theme."}

candidates.text: I tried to keep a secret about the frost flowers, but they were so delicate that the moment I touched the subject, they vanished.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Playful wordplay on 'touch' and 'vanish,' aligns with headline, concise and specific."}

candidates.text: They said the ice sculpture was a real showstopper — until someone sneezed and it vanished in one touch. Turns out, it wasn't just frost flowers, it was a frost *snort*.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Clever wordplay on 'frost flowers' and 'frost snort,' with a surprising twist tied to the headline. Brevity and specificity align well with the input."}

candidates.text: Frost flowers don't just melt away—they're more like those exes who ghost you after one bad date.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is relatable and uses a modern metaphor (ghosting exes), which adds surprise and specificity. However, it's slightly generic in its comparison and could be more concise."}

candidates.text: I tried to photograph a frost flower, but the moment I touched my phone, it melted into a puddle of regret and bad decisions.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses a surprising twist (the phone melting), and ties back to the headline with 'regret and bad decisions' implying poor photography choices. However, it's slightly generic in its humor and doesn't fully leverage the specificity of frost flowers."}

candidates.text: Frost flowers are the only things in nature that can be destroyed by a gentle touch, which is why they are the ultimate inspiration for my "fragile" personality during a first date.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative and ties the frost flowers to a relatable situation, but it feels a bit forced and lacks the sharp surprise or specificity that would make it stand out in a humor competition."}

candidates.text: Frost flowers are the only things in nature that have a very cold personality but still manage to be quite blooming.
My girlfriend said I was too cold for her, so we broke up. Turns out she just didn’t like my *frost* humor.
I tried to capture a frost flower with my bare hands—it melted so fast I thought I was holding ice made of regret.
